creator: filiperocha@gmail.com
text:
Hello Edwin,
Needed to test if those .thumbs directories were part of the original
package. Everything looks OK and it's good to go.

Thanks wenheping and Edwin,
Filipe



On Sun, Jun 15, 2008 at 11:50 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
